name: Measurement & Data 5th
description: Unit conversions, line plots with fractions, and volume of rectangular prisms
objectives: Convert among units within the metric and customary measurement systems
Interpret line plots with measurements in fractions of a unit
Understand volume as counting unit cubes with no gaps or overlaps
Find volumes of right rectangular prisms with V = l × w × h
Find volumes of solid figures composed of two rectangular prisms

ai.guidelines: Focus on converting measurement units within one system (like centimeters to meters or feet to inches, including decimal metric conversions), interpreting line plots whose measurements are fractions of a unit (1/4, 1/2, 3/4), understanding volume as counting unit cubes, computing volumes of right rectangular prisms with V = l × w × h, and finding volumes of figures made of two non-overlapping rectangular prisms. Keep conversions exact and volumes whole numbers.
